products.name: Heuraufe
products.mechanism: Welded carbon steel (S355) tube-frame structure from laser-cut and CNC-bent RHS profiles, MIG/MAG certified welding (DIN EN ISO 3834-2), inclined hay-net cradle, pitched roof section; outsourced hot-dip galvanizing + powder topcoat

productFP.statement: Store and deliver hay to multiple horses simultaneously in outdoor paddock environments — with all-side access, weather-protected storage, and elevated ground clearance that reduces contamination and daily labor compared to floor-feeding
differentiators: elevated ground clearance (reduces contamination from urine and mud)
15-year outdoor service life with certified corrosion protection

commodityFP.commodity: UNSPSC 22111509 — Hay feeders, racks, and mangers
commodityFP.statement: Store and dispense roughage for multiple livestock simultaneously in outdoor agricultural environments

bomPosition.note: Standalone equipment unit; not a component

complements.name: Hay net or hay net ring insert

products.name: Paddockbox
products.mechanism: Welded carbon steel (S355) RHS tube-frame modular panels on industrial castors (800kg lateral rating, wheel brakes), hinged and removable post connections; outsourced hot-dip galvanizing + powder topcoat

productFP.statement: Partition and manage outdoor paddock or stable space around horses — with modular reconfigurability, castor-mounted repositionability, and fold-flat post clearance that enables efficient stable operations without fixed construction
productFP.object: outdoor paddock or stable space for equine management
productFP.context: in outdoor equestrian and stable environments
differentiators: modular layout (reconfigures to any paddock geometry without tools)
fold-flat / removable posts (tractor clearance without obstruction)
wall-hinge mount option (saves permanent floor space)
no groundwork, foundation, or permanent installation required

commodityFP.statement: Partition and contain livestock in defined outdoor areas using portable, repositionable enclosure elements
commodityFP.fpExtension: The modular mobile enclosure panel form factor extends beyond equestrian use to: temporary animal control at veterinary facilities and livestock shows; mobile outdoor kennel runs for working dogs; event safety barriers.

bomPosition.note: Individual panels are sub-units; configured set is the deliverable
